prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(register_medication_error_case pharmacy_main)
(assign_operational_resource_to_case pharmacy_main pharmacist_shift_1)
(link_investigator_to_case pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(mark_case_ready_for_assignment pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(flag_supply_node_for_quarantine pharmacy_main supply_node_warehouse_a investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(assign_sme_to_case pharmacy_main sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(confirm_location_containment pharmacy_main supply_node_warehouse_a sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(release_sme pharmacy_main sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(release_investigator pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(register_medication_error_case clinical_unit_med_surgical)
(assign_operational_resource_to_case clinical_unit_med_surgical pharmacist_shift_2)
(link_investigator_to_case clinical_unit_med_surgical investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(mark_case_ready_for_assignment clinical_unit_med_surgical investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(flag_supply_batch_for_quarantine clinical_unit_med_surgical supply_batch_lot_1234 investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(assign_sme_to_case clinical_unit_med_surgical sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(confirm_unit_containment clinical_unit_med_surgical supply_batch_lot_1234 sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(release_sme clinical_unit_med_surgical sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(release_investigator clinical_unit_med_surgical investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(issue_recall_notice_standard pharmacy_main clinical_unit_med_surgical supply_node_warehouse_a supply_batch_lot_1234 recall_notice_rn001)
(link_investigator_to_case pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(acknowledge_recall_notice_by_location recall_notice_rn001 pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(release_investigator pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(record_final_verification_for_location pharmacy_main recall_notice_rn001)
(record_final_verification_for_unit clinical_unit_med_surgical recall_notice_rn001)
(register_medication_error_case coordinator_primary)
(assign_operational_resource_to_case coordinator_primary pharmacist_shift_3)
(link_investigator_to_case coordinator_primary investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(mark_case_ready_for_assignment coordinator_primary investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(quarantine_inventory_item coordinator_primary inventory_item_001 recall_notice_rn001)
(start_inventory_verification coordinator_primary inventory_item_001 recall_notice_rn001 investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(assign_remediation_step_to_coordinator coordinator_primary remediation_step_label_correction)
(assign_sme_to_case coordinator_primary sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(start_coordinator_analysis_no_escalation coordinator_primary remediation_step_label_correction sme_clinical_pharmacy inventory_item_001 recall_notice_rn001)
(release_sme coordinator_primary sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(complete_remediation_step coordinator_primary remediation_step_label_correction)
(assign_recovery_plan_to_coordinator coordinator_primary recovery_plan_restore_operations)
(mark_coordinator_ready_for_verification coordinator_primary recovery_plan_restore_operations inventory_item_001 recall_notice_rn001)
(complete_recovery_plan coordinator_primary recovery_plan_restore_operations)
(final_verification_without_additional_checks coordinator_primary)
(attach_evidence_and_flag_case_for_resource_allocation coordinator_primary evidence_item_dispensing_record investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(release_investigator coordinator_primary investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(allocate_resource_and_execute_containment_for_coordinator coordinator_primary pharmacist_shift_3 evidence_item_dispensing_record)
(register_medication_error_case coordinator_backup)
(assign_operational_resource_to_case coordinator_backup pharmacist_shift_3)
(link_investigator_to_case coordinator_backup investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(mark_case_ready_for_assignment coordinator_backup investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(quarantine_inventory_item coordinator_backup inventory_item_002 recall_notice_rn001)
(start_inventory_verification coordinator_backup inventory_item_002 recall_notice_rn001 investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(assign_remediation_step_to_coordinator coordinator_backup remediation_step_label_correction)
(assign_sme_to_case coordinator_backup sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(start_coordinator_analysis_no_escalation coordinator_backup remediation_step_label_correction sme_clinical_pharmacy inventory_item_002 recall_notice_rn001)
(release_sme coordinator_backup sme_clinical_pharmacy)
(complete_remediation_step coordinator_backup remediation_step_label_correction)
(assign_recovery_plan_to_coordinator coordinator_backup recovery_plan_restore_operations)
(mark_coordinator_ready_for_verification coordinator_backup recovery_plan_restore_operations inventory_item_002 recall_notice_rn001)
(complete_recovery_plan coordinator_backup recovery_plan_restore_operations)
(final_verification_without_additional_checks coordinator_backup)
(attach_evidence_and_flag_case_for_resource_allocation coordinator_backup evidence_item_dispensing_record investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(release_investigator coordinator_backup investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(allocate_resource_and_execute_containment_for_coordinator coordinator_backup pharmacist_shift_3 evidence_item_dispensing_record)
(link_investigator_to_case pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(attach_evidence_and_flag_case_for_resource_allocation pharmacy_main evidence_item_dispensing_record investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(allocate_resource_and_execute_containment_at_location pharmacy_main pharmacist_shift_1 evidence_item_dispensing_record)
(release_investigator pharmacy_main investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(link_investigator_to_case clinical_unit_med_surgical investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(attach_evidence_and_flag_case_for_resource_allocation clinical_unit_med_surgical evidence_item_dispensing_record investigator_pharmacovigilance_1)
(allocate_resource_and_execute_containment_in_unit clinical_unit_med_surgical pharmacist_shift_2 evidence_item_dispensing_record)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for handling a medication error follow-up scenario. The goal is to achieve containment_executed for pharmacy_main, clinical_unit_med_surgical, coordinator_primary, and coordinator_backup.


## Examining Problem Scope  
- The problem focuses on a planning scenario in PDDL for managing a medication error follow-up.  
- It aims to ensure containment is executed across pharmacy_main, clinical_unit_med_surgical, coordinator_primary, and coordinator_backup.

## Examining Initial State  
- The initial state includes operational resources like pharmacist_shift_1,2,3, an investigator (investigator_pharmacovigilance_1), and a SME (sme_clinical_pharmacy).  
- Available options include mitigation_protocol_change, with links like pharmacy_main to supply_node_warehouse_a and clinical_unit_med_surgical to supply_batch_lot_1234.  
- Recall notice (recall_notice_rn001) is active, and inventory items (001,002) are available, alongside coordinators, stakeholders, evidence, and a recovery plan.  

## Analyzing Entity Types  
- Incident_entity is a supertype including affected_unit_group (e.g., pharmacy_location, clinical_unit) and response_entity_group (e.g., response_coordinator).  
- Initially, no entities are reported, and there’s no specific "register" action for locations, units, or coordinators, though register_medication_error_case exists for incident_entity.  

## Mapping Containment Process  
- Containment_executed requires final_verification_passed_for_entity, then evidence attachment, resource allocation, and execution via allocate_resource_and_execute_containment actions.  
- For pharmacy_location and clinical_unit, final verification needs containment confirmed, recall generated, and acknowledged; coordinators have multiple verification paths like final_verification_without_additional_checks.

## Extending Containment Process  
- For pharmacy_main, confirm_location_containment links SME and declares quarantine, initiating and confirming containment.  
- Mitigation for pharmacy_main involves applying and finalizing mitigation options, requiring investigator linkage and supply connections.  

## Managing Investigator Allocation  
- Investigator must be linked to locations for actions like finalize_location_mitigation, with a release_investigator action to reassign.  
- Only one investigator is available, requiring sequential linkage to pharmacy_main and clinical_unit for containment execution.  

## Handling Recall and Acknowledgment  
- Issuing recall requires both pharmacy and unit to be initiated, confirmed, and linked, with recall_notice active.  
- Recall acknowledgment is location-specific, using acknowledge_recall_notice_by_location, with no separate action for units.  

## Processing Coordinators  
- Coordinators like coordinator_primary need entity_ready_for_assignment, similar to locations and units, starting with registration.  
- After recall generation and acknowledgment, coordinators can quarantine inventory items, requiring linkage to recall and inventory.

## Sequencing Entity Management  
- Entities like pharmacy_main and clinical_unit_med_surgical require sequential processing due to limited investigator and SME availability.  
- Process involves linking to one entity, performing necessary actions, releasing, then linking to the next entity for tasks like quarantine or containment.  

## Executing Quarantine Path  
- For pharmacy_main, register, assign resources, link investigator, and mark ready before flagging supply for quarantine, needing SME linkage.  
- After SME assignment and containment confirmation, investigator and SME remain linked, requiring release for further actions on other entities.  

## Handling Clinical Unit Containment  
- For clinical_unit_med_surgical, follow similar steps: register, assign resources, but release investigator from pharmacy_main first if linked.  
- After quarantine and containment confirmation, release investigator and SME to reassign for other tasks, ensuring recall issuance prerequisites are met.  

## Managing Recall Acknowledgment  
- Recall notice issuance requires both entities initiated and confirmed, with linked supplies and active status, generating a recall notice.  
- Acknowledgment by location needs investigator relinked to the entity, ensuring all preconditions like generated notice and initiated containment are met.

## Managing Resource Allocation  
- Operational resources (op res) are limited to three shifts, initially assigned to pharmacy, clinical, and primary, leaving no backup initially.  
- To free an op res for backup, execute containment for one entity, releasing resources after final verification and evidence attachment.  

## Planning Entity Processing  
- Process entities sequentially to manage investigator (inv) and subject matter expert (SME) availability, linking to one at a time and releasing when done.  
- Complete remediation and recovery steps after use to make them available for reassignment, ensuring analysis and readiness preconditions are met.  

## Executing Containment Strategy  
- Confirm containment for both pharmacy and clinical units early, issue recall, acknowledge, and verify before executing containment, which is the final step.  
- For pharmacy, ensure investigator is linked before attaching evidence and executing containment, managing resource allocation carefully to handle multiple entities.  

## Outlining Process for Pharmacy  
- Start with registering medication error case for pharmacy_main, assign operational resource (pharmacist_shift_1), and link investigator.  
- Proceed to mark case ready, flag supply for quarantine, and assign SME, ensuring all steps align with resource and linkage management.

## Executing Containment Strategy
- After executing for primary, shift3 becomes available, enabling assignment to backup for further processing.
- For backup, follow similar steps up to attaching evidence, ensuring investigator and SME are released post-analysis to free resources.

## Managing Backup Execution
- Execute containment for backup using shift3, freeing it again after evidence attachment, ensuring all prerequisites like final verification are met.
- Both coordinators (primary and backup) are now executed, with resources and evidence managed effectively.

## Handling Pharmacy and Clinical
- Link investigator to pharmacy_main and attach evidence, ensuring operational resource (shift1) is already assigned for execution.
- Execute containment for pharmacy, releasing shift1 and making evidence available, preparing for clinical unit next.

## Reviewing SME and Investigator Releases  
- Release SME after analysis for both primary and backup coordinators, ensuring no escalation impacts availability.  
- Investigator releases occur post-execution, aligning with acknowledgment and resource availability for pharmacy and clinical units.  

## Checking Resource Assignment Effects  
- Operational resource remains assigned to a case even after execution, with availability restored but no unassignment action needed.  
- This setup works since reassignment isn't required, avoiding conflicts with ongoing processes.  

## Listing Action Sequence  
- Begin with registering and assigning resources for pharmacy_main, followed by investigator linking and marking case ready.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
